name: Minecraft SLIMYGLOOP® Gelli Gels Creeper, Green Slow-Flow Glitter Squishy Sensory Toy, Squeeze Stress Toy for Kids & Teens, Satisfying Sugar Squish Fidget
bullets: SLOW-FLOW SUGAR SQUISH: Creeper approaching! This green Gelli Gel is filled with mesmerizing slow-flow glitter that makes every squeeze more satisfying than a regular stress ball.
SQUISH, STRETCH & BOUNCE BACK – No matter how much you stretch or squish, this Gelli Gel magically bounces back to its classic pixelated shape every time — talk about mine over matter!
ENDLESS SENSORY PLAY – Built for satisfying sensory play, this sugar squish fidget delivers a calming, engaging sensory experience.
FIDGET FUN ANYTIME, ANYWHERE – From the school bus to your gaming setup, enjoy quick moments of focus or fidget play on the go.
OFFICIAL MINECRAFT TOY – A fun, collectible fidget for Minecraft fans of all ages 4+.
description: Introducing your new favorite fidget toy: the Minecraft SLIMYGLOOP® Creeper Gelli Gel! Filled with a mesmerizing, slow-flow glitter gel that’s super satisfying to squeeze, stretch, and twist, this Gelli Gel is the explosive upgrade your stress ball never knew it needed. Pull it, squish it, or flatten it, then watch as it magically forms back into its iconic shape just like creepers: Built to blast, but always bounce back! Perfect for sensory play or focus breaks during a long session of mine time, this pocket-sized fidget is endlessly fun for fans of all ages. Available in creeper green, Ender

reviews.name: nurselauren83
reviews.title: Durable, Odor-Free and Great Value
reviews.body: This is a great-quality squishy at an excellent price! It’s soft and satisfying to squeeze, yet durable enough to hold up to frequent use without ripping or tearing. Another big plus is that it doesn’t have the strong chemical odor that many squishies do. Overall, it’s well-made, long-lasting and a great value for the money.

reviews.name: Elizabeth Melton
reviews.title: 13 year old approves!!!!
reviews.body: This was a God send! During this season where every child from 5-18 want NEEDOHS, and if you can find real ones they are OUTRAGEOUS in price; being able to satiate my child’s desires for a “squishy” that was cute, felt good and didn’t absolutely KILL my wallet I was beyond impressed! HIGHLY RECOMMENDEDGOD BLESS ALL

reviews.name: Justin
reviews.title: Awesome squish
reviews.body: Had a faint scent but when away when we washed it. Love the sugar texture and how thick and durable it feels.

reviews.name: Amy Kasper
reviews.title: Nice squeeze
reviews.body: It’s a good squish. My daughter likes it.
